_comment: Pinned model checksums and revision hashes. sha256 fields are verified at download time. Update by running: python scripts/model_cache_check.py --update-lock
_format: model_id -> { revision: <git-commit-sha>, sha256: <hexdigest>, license: <spdx>, required: bool }

Vansh180/deepfake-audio-wav2vec2.notes: Primary audio deepfake detection model (wav2vec2-based). Controls AASIST_MODEL_NAME.

clovaai/AASIST.notes: Opt-in fallback. Research-only license — not for commercial use. Set AASIST_MODEL_NAME=clovaai/AASIST to enable.

pyannote/speaker-diarization-3.1.notes: Requires HuggingFace user agreement. Set HF_TOKEN in .env.

openai/clip-vit-base-patch32.notes: ViT-B/32 CLIP — default OpenCLIP model (~150MB). Mapped from SIGLIP_MODEL_NAME=ViT-B-32.

openai/clip-vit-large-patch14.notes: ViT-L-14 CLIP — high-precision opt-in (~1.5GB). Set SIGLIP_MODEL_NAME=ViT-L-14.

microsoft/swinv2-tiny-patch4-window8-256.notes: Optional image classifier replacement for YOLO (Apache-2.0 path).

facebook/detr-resnet-50.notes: Permissive YOLO replacement for deployments requiring Apache-2.0 license.

resnet50_torchvision.notes: ResNet-50 torchvision weights DEFAULT - checksum computed after first download
